channel.title: News on Better Tomorrow with Computer Science
channel.description: Recent content in News on Better Tomorrow with Computer Science

item.title: I defended my PhD and will join NVIDIA Research!
item.description: After incredible 5 years at Michigan, I defended my PhD and graduated. I will be joining NVIDIA to research scalable agentic AI systems.

item.title: Cornstarch Accepted to ICML'26
item.description: Cornstarch has been accepted to ICML'26. Cornstarch is a distributed multimodal training framework. Try it out at https://github.com/cornstarch-org/Cornstarch.

item.title: Perseus Accepted to SOSP'24
item.description: Perseus has been accepted to SOSP'24. Perseus is for optimizing energy consumption of large model distributed training while minimizing impact to training throughput.

item.title: Oobleck Accepted to SOSP'23
item.description: Oobleck has been accepted to SOSP'23! Oobleck is a distributed training framework that supports fast fault tolerance without full restart from checkpoint.

item.title: Internship at Tesla in Summer 2023
item.description: I am going to work as an Intern at Tesla Autopilot Infrastructure team. Can’t wait to experience and work on large scale supercomputers that I have never seen before!

item.title: Changed Blog Theme
item.description: Changed blog theme to Congo. Thanks James Panther for making a good theme!
